EnduranceToggle.Name: Endurance Toggle
EnduranceToggle.Hint: Toggles the automation of the Endurance system.

SoulToggle.Name: Soul Toggle
SoulToggle.Hint: Toggles the automation of the Soul system.

ChatMessages.Name: Toggle Chat Messages
ChatMessages.Hint: Toggles messages in chat for Soul and Endurance.

Meters.Name: Toggle Sheet Meters
Meters.Hint: Shows the Endurance and Soul meters on Tidy5e character sheets.

HideMessages.Name: Hide Messages Toggle
HideMessages.Hint: When on, non-GM players only see chat rows for actors they own. Empty sections and entire messages collapse automatically.

SoulItemBlacklist.Name: Soul Item Blacklist
SoulItemBlacklist.Hint: Comma-separated list of item names that should not generate Soul.

SoulSectionBlacklist.Name: Soul Section Blacklist
SoulSectionBlacklist.Hint: Comma-separated list of Tidy5e sections that should not generate Soul.

ForceReload.Name: Force Reload
ForceReload.Hint: Triggers a reload of the game.

MeterColor.Name: {label} Meter Color
MeterColor.Hint: Override the {label} meter colour. Leave blank to use the Tidy theme default.

EnduranceBreakItems.Name: Endurance Break Items
EnduranceBreakItems.Label: Configure
EnduranceBreakItems.Hint: Configure which item UUID fires the synthetic damage roll for each damage type when Endurance breaks.

BreakConfig.Title: Endurance Break Items
BreakConfig.Hint: Map each damage type to the item UUID used for synthetic rolls when Endurance breaks. Leave blank to skip that damage type.
